data.title: test-merge-to-main-resume: awk depth-tracking double-counts if-block nesting
data.description:
## Incident Overview
Source: code review (passed) — minor finding not addressed in this session.
Finding: In test-merge-to-main-resume-push-idempotent.sh, the awk depth-tracking block has a double-count on the opening trigger line — the opening if-pattern increments depth but then depth-- runs immediately for the closing fi check, potentially causing premature block termination.
File: tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-resume-push-idempotent.sh
Category: verification
